blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I've been thinking about what you said.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: About being the reason something goes wrong. You said you're afraid of that.

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I think you're wrong. I think you're the opposite of that. The reason things work when you're in them.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You don't have to say that

blocks.speaker: Crystal
blocks.content: I know I don't have to. I'm saying it because it's true.
I held the phone for a moment longer than I needed to.
I put the phone down and picked up the notebook. Wrote her name. Then crossed it out. Some things didn't need to be written to be kept.
